svg.title: OmicsLens R package architecture diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end multi-omics R package with four input layers feeding a core integration engine, outputting to Shiny dashboard and HTML report
svg.text: Multi-omics integration · Shiny dashboard · HTML report

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What RNA-Seq input does OmicsLens expect?')
sendPrompt('What WGS input does OmicsLens expect?')
sendPrompt('What methylation input does OmicsLens expect?')
sendPrompt('What clinical metadata does OmicsLens need?')
sendPrompt('What does OmicsLens do to preprocess RNA-Seq data?')
sendPrompt('How does OmicsLens filter and annotate variants?')
sendPrompt('How does OmicsLens process methylation data?')
sendPrompt('How does MOFA2 integration work in OmicsLens?')
g.text: Learns shared latent factors across RNA · WGS · methylation · identifies driver signatures

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What differential analysis does OmicsLens run?')
sendPrompt('What enrichment analysis does OmicsLens do?')
sendPrompt('What survival and ML models does OmicsLens include?')
sendPrompt('What does the OmicsLens Shiny dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What does the OmicsLens HTML report contain?')
g.text: R Markdown · all figures + tables + methods
